A _horizontal_ fluid tank. Less efficient when used as a boiler.

colorfulpipes.ponder.cogwheel_casing.tex: Copper or Colored Casing can be used to decorate Cogwheels
Components added after encasing will not connect to the shaft outputs
The Wrench can be used to toggle connections
Copper Casing can be used to decorate Fluid Pipes
Aside from being concealed, Encased Pipes are locked into their connectivity state
It will no longer react to any neighbouring blocks being added or removed
colorfulpipes.ponder.experience_hatch.in: The Experience Hatch is simple to use. Right click it to store Experience...
There are a filter slot and a scroll panel on Hatch. You can configure how much Experience is retrieved or deposited per interaction on the panel
The filter slot is used to deal with experience fluids of other mods
For example, assume that Liquid Cyan Dye is experience fluid from another mod
Place Bucket of Cyan Dye in the filter slot
You can now directly insert and extract Cyan Dye as "Cyan Experience"
Experience Lantern absorbs experience from nearby players and experience orb. It glows according to the amount of experience stored internally
Experience Lantern also works on Contraption
colorfulpipes.ponder.fluid_pipe_flow.tex: Fluid Pipes can connect two or more fluid sources and targets
Using a wrench, a straight pipe segment can be given a window
Windowed pipes will not connect to any other adjacent pipe segments
Powered by Mechanical Pumps, the Pipes can transport Fluids
No fluid is being extracted at first
Once the flow connects them, the endpoints gradually transfer their contents
Thus, the Pipe blocks themselves never 'physically' contain any fluid
colorfulpipes.ponder.fluid_pipe_interact: Endpoints of a pipe network can interact with a variety of blocks
Any block with fluid storage capabilities can be filled or drained
Source blocks right in front of an open end can be picked up...
...while spilling into empty spaces can create fluid sources
Pipes can also extract fluids from a handful of other blocks directly
colorfulpipes.ponder.fluid_tank_sizes.te: Fluid Tanks can be combined to increase the total capacity
Their base square can be up to 3 blocks wide...
...and grow in height by more than 30 additional layers
Using a Wrench, a tanks' window can be toggled
Fluid Tanks can be used to store large amounts of fluid
Pipe networks can push and pull fluids from any side
The contained fluid can be measured by a Comparator
However, in Survival Mode Fluids cannot be added or taken manually
You can use Basins, Item Drains and Spouts to drain or fill fluid containing items
colorfulpipes.ponder.hose_pulley.header: Source Filling and Draining using Hose Pulleys
colorfulpipes.ponder.hose_pulley.text_1: Hose Pulleys can be used to fill or drain large bodies of Fluid
colorfulpipes.ponder.hose_pulley.text_2: With the Kinetic Input, the height of the pulleys' hose can be controlled
colorfulpipes.ponder.hose_pulley.text_3: The Pulley retracts while the input rotation is inverted
colorfulpipes.ponder.hose_pulley.text_4: On the opposite side, pipes can be connected
colorfulpipes.ponder.hose_pulley.text_5: Attached pipe networks can either provide fluid to the hose...
colorfulpipes.ponder.hose_pulley.text_6: ...or pull from it, draining the pool instead
colorfulpipes.ponder.hose_pulley.text_7: Fill and Drain speed of the pulley depends entirely on the fluid networks' throughput
colorfulpipes.ponder.hose_pulley_infinit: Passively Filling and Draining large bodies of Fluid
When deploying the Hose Pulley into a large enough ocean...
It will provide/dispose fluids without affecting the source
Pipe networks can limitlessly take fluids from/to such pulleys
colorfulpipes.ponder.hose_pulley_level.h: Fill and Drain level of Hose Pulleys
colorfulpipes.ponder.hose_pulley_level.t: While fully retracted, the Hose Pulley cannot operate
Draining runs from top to bottom
The surface level will end up just below where the hose ends
Filling runs from bottom to top
The filled pool will not grow beyond the layer above the hose end
colorfulpipes.ponder.item_drain.header: Emptying Fluid Containers using Item Drains
colorfulpipes.ponder.item_drain.text_1: Item Drains can extract fluids from items
colorfulpipes.ponder.item_drain.text_2: Right-click it to pour fluids from your held item into it
colorfulpipes.ponder.item_drain.text_3: When items are inserted from the side...
colorfulpipes.ponder.item_drain.text_4: ...they roll across, emptying out their contained fluid
colorfulpipes.ponder.item_drain.text_5: Pipe Networks can now pull the fluid from the drains' internal buffer
colorfulpipes.ponder.mechanical_pump_flo: Mechanical Pumps govern the flow of their attached pipe networks
Their arrow indicates the direction of flow
The network behind is now pulling fluids...
...while the network in front is transferring it outward
The pumps direction is unaffected by the input rotation
Instead, a Wrench can be used to reverse the direction
colorfulpipes.ponder.mechanical_pump_spe: Regardless of speed, Mechanical Pumps affect pipes connected up to 16 blocks away
Speeding up the input rotation changes the speed of flow propagation...
...and the speed at which fluids are transferred
Pumps can combine their throughputs within shared pipe networks
Ensure that all of them are facing in the same direction
colorfulpipes.ponder.portable_fluid_inte: Fluid Tanks on moving contraptions cannot be accessed by any pipes
This component can interact with fluid tanks without the need to stop the contraption
Place a second one with a gap of 1 or 2 blocks inbetween
Whenever they pass by each other, they will engage in a connection
While engaged, the stationary interface will represent ALL Tanks on the contraption
After no contents have been exchanged for a while, the contraption will continue on its way
colorfulpipes.ponder.portable_storage_in: Redstone power will prevent the stationary interface from engaging
colorfulpipes.ponder.printer.intro.text_: Before use, set the item to print via the filter slot...
It can also name items, copy train schedule, copy clipboard, change package address and more. Use JEI to look up printing recipe
colorfulpipes.ponder.shaft_casing.text_1: copper or glass Casing can be used to decorate Shafts
colorfulpipes.ponder.smart_pipe.header: Controlling Fluid flow using Smart Pipes
colorfulpipes.ponder.smart_pipe.text_1: Smart pipes can help control flows by fluid type
colorfulpipes.ponder.smart_pipe.text_2: When placed directly at the source, they can specify the type of fluid to extract
colorfulpipes.ponder.smart_pipe.text_3: Simply Right-Click their filter slot with any item containing the desired fluid
colorfulpipes.ponder.smart_pipe.text_4: When placed further down a pipe network, smart pipes will only let matching fluids continue
colorfulpipes.ponder.spout_filling.text_: The Spout can fill fluid holding items provided beneath it
The content of a Spout cannot be accessed manually
Instead, Pipes can be used to supply it with fluids
The Input items can be placed on a Depot under the Spout
When items are provided on a belt...
The Spout will hold and process them automatically
colorfulpipes.ponder.steam_whistle.text_: Steam Whistles can be placed on a Fluid Tank
If the tank receives sufficient heat...
...the Whistle will play a note when activated
Use a Whistle item on the block to lower its pitch
Cycle between three different octaves using a Wrench
Engineer's Goggles can help to find out the current pitch of a Whistle
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_1: Table cloths can be used to display items
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_10: When checking out at the cashier, the bought items will be placed into a package
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_11: From there, they can be transported to the shop front
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_12: The payments will be stored inside the stock ticker block
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_2: With the help of a logistics system, they can also be used to sell items
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_3: Start with the shop's inventory, a Packager and Stock link
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_4: Bind a Stock ticker to the link and place it in the shop
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_5: Employ a mob or blaze burner as the shop keeper
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_6: Fill the shop inventory with items to be sold
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_7: To create a new trade, interact with the shop keeper while holding a table cloth
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_8: Once placed, set a price in the item slot on the side
colorfulpipes.ponder.table_cloth.text_9: Other players can now interact with the shop
colorfulpipes.ponder.valve_pipe.text_1: Valve pipes help control fluids propagating through pipe networks
colorfulpipes.ponder.valve_pipe.text_2: Their shaft input controls whether fluid is currently allowed through
colorfulpipes.ponder.valve_pipe.text_3: Given Rotational Force in the opening direction, the valve will open up
colorfulpipes.ponder.valve_pipe.text_4: It can be closed again by reversing the input rotation
